name: 07-07-round-7-blog-knowledge-evidence-quality-gate
title: Round 7 blog knowledge evidence quality gate
description: Add evidence-first checks for public knowledge posts so knowledge accumulation content keeps concrete knowledge points, source/evidence notes, and non-generic structure without model generation.

notes: Completed Codex-only knowledge evidence quality gate. No model/provider live calls. Added blog:knowledge-check, refreshed public knowledge validation, strengthened existing knowledge posts with public repo evidence notes, and hardened check:ui against route-level article loading and lazy-image flake.
